messages.content: You are an agriculture assistant with access to soil sensors and weather APIs.
Check soil moisture in my plot at 12.9716, 77.5946 and tell me if I should irrigate.
Soil moisture at the plot is 18%, below the typical 30% threshold for most crops, and only 2 mm rainfall is forecast over the next 3 days. I recommend irrigating today — about 25-30 mm worth.
Get the latest mandi prices for tomatoes in Bangalore. Email me the report at farmer.r@example.com if available.
Tomatoes in Bengaluru today are trading at ₹1200-1800 per quintal, with a modal price of ₹1500. I'll have the report sent to your registered email.
Has anyone reported pest issues in Mandya district lately?

In the last 30 days, Mandya has seen 7 brown plant hopper reports in paddy and 4 early shoot borer reports in sugarcane. I'd recommend scouting paddy fields for nymphs and applying recommended insecticides if thresholds are crossed.

feedback_pairs.chosen: In the last 30 days, Mandya has seen 7 brown plant hopper reports in paddy and 4 early shoot borer reports in sugarcane.
feedback_pairs.rejected: I don't have any data on Mandya district.
